introduction: Claire is an actor attending an audition. Unnerved by the arrival of her period moments before, she must overcome her anxieties and deliver a compelling performance until she realizes that the unexpected could be exactly what she needed.Congratulations to Lucy Kennedy whose film ‘Blood Lines’ has been officially selected for the Tokyo Lift-Off Film Festival as well as being selected as a Semi-Finalist in the Australia Independent Film Festival.Lucy not only stars in the film, but also wrote the film herself. We’re very proud of the commitment and hard work that Lucy continuously shows
